note: Run windows recovered from in-repo records on 2026-07-01. Git history collapses most experiment dirs onto the 2026-06-28 corpus import commit; these windows restore the real chronology from dated experiment-log headings, config date keys, epoch timestamps in run artifacts, git history for post-import dirs, and file mtimes for in-place work. Entries with confidence 'none' were searched and have no recoverable record. Audit or extend with scripts/extract_experiment_dates.py.
